title: Progress in negotiations between the United States and Iran boosts markets

summary: The storage company acquires a Canadian company, boosting its shares.

summary: The US president highlighted IBM's quantum advances, boosting its shares.

title: Alan Greenspan, former Federal Reserve Chairman, dies
summary: The influential central banker who led the Fed from 1987 to 2006 dies at 99 years old.

summary: The US market ended with mixed results, attentive to the negotiations between the US and Iran.

summary: The fast-food chain announces the departure of its CEO, generating uncertainty.

summary: The derivatives exchange operator experiences technical issues affecting Monday's operations.

title: SpaceX drops 16% in stock market and posts third consecutive decline

summary: The talent loss in artificial intelligence worries Google investors.

summary: The Spanish index approaches its highest levels, driven by market confidence.
